scenarios.title: Trace guard accepts SCN-019-004 and SCN-019-005 as faithfully covered

gherkin.given: parent spec 019 scopes.md contains Gherkin scenarios SCN-019-004 ("Config entries exist for all 5 connectors in smackerel.yaml") and SCN-019-005 ("Health endpoint shows all 15 connectors"), and traceability-guard.sh v3.8.0 percentage-based matcher requires score >= ceil(word_count/2) significant-word overlap between scenario text and a Scope 1 DoD bullet
gherkin.when: bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/019-connector-wiring is executed after appending two trace-ID-bearing DoD bullets to the end of Scope 1 DoD (one per scenario) without deleting, weakening, or rewriting any pre-existing DoD bullet, and underlying behavior tests (tests/integration/test_connector_wiring.sh and go test -run TestHealthHandler_ConnectorHealth ./internal/api/...) are re-executed
gherkin.then: the guard exits with RESULT: PASSED (0 warnings), DoD fidelity reports 6 scenarios checked / 6 mapped to DoD / 0 unmapped, the integration script reports 32/32 PASS with last line "SCN-019-004: PASS" at exit 0, and TestHealthHandler_ConnectorHealth reports PASS at exit 0 — proving zero green->red drift on production source
